title: Stale-catch: change-time invalidation heartbeat (verified v2.2.1)
summary: staleCatch detects memories invalidated by working tree/diff changes; surfaced by kage pr check lead and kage staleguard pre commit; stale caught events feed the ledger and kage gains. Quiet refresh on non default branch
body: staleCatch detects memories invalidated by working-tree/diff changes; surfaced by kage pr check lead and kage staleguard pre-commit; stale_caught events feed the ledger and kage gains. Quiet refresh on non-default branches computes staleness in memory without persisting metadata rewrites; personal packets excluded. Unchanged by 2.2.1.
